title: Agenda
description: Four topics: Executive Summary, Key Metrics, Product Highlights, Roadmap & Next Steps

title: Executive Summary
description: Q2 results confirm the growth trajectory projected in Q1

title: KPI Scorecard
description: Four of five KPIs beat target in Q2

title: ARR Growth
description: ARR reached $2.11M in Q2, up 47% from the prior quarter

title: User Engagement
description: Monthly active users reached 1,660 in June, up 34% from Q1

title: Net Revenue Retention
description: NRR of 118% confirms customers are expanding, not churning

title: Product Highlights
description: Three major features shipped in Q2, each adopted by over 60% of active clients

title: Challenges & Learnings
description: Two Q2 items were scoped and deferred to Q3 with defined mitigation plans

title: Roadmap
description: Q3 centers on mobile, global search, and enterprise tier; Q4 adds analytics and scale

title: Next Steps
description: Three decisions are needed from this review to advance Q3 priorities
